LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeReturnedVictory: Strike team extracted with Crown-Heart breach rewards secured: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketOutcome_Victory: The strike team breached the Crown-Heart, extracted from the dominion slice, and returned with proof of passage.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketOutcome_Retreat: The strike team withdrew from the dominion slice before breaching the Crown-Heart.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketOutcome_FailureLost: The strike team was lost inside the dominion slice before extraction could be completed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketOutcome_FailureCollaps: The dominion slice collapsed before the strike team could secure an extraction route.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketOutcome_FailureNoExtra: The Crown-Heart was broken, but the strike team failed to extract before the dominion slice collapsed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionOpsDirective_Extraction: Extract the strike team before the slice collapses. Window remaining: {0}.
